name: Maono USB Microphone Podcast Set Cardioid Condenser AU 902
description: Dual Volume Control & Mute Function AU902 USB microphone comes with two volume control buttons which makes it easy to adjust your headphone volume and microphone.

features.Key Features:: Microphone-Core: Dia 14mm Condenser | Polar Pattern: Cardioid | Frequency Response: 20Hz~20KHz | Sensitivity: -35dB+/-3dB(0dB=1V/Pa at 1kHz) | Maximum SPL: 110dB | S/N Radio: 70dB | Sampling Rate: 44.1kHz/48kHz; 16bit | Cable: USB A to C Cable 1.0m
features.What's in the box?: 1x Microphone | 1x USB A to Type C Cable | 1x Detachable metal desktop stand | 1x User manual | 1x Kartu Garansi Resmi
